title: Build Animated Star Field Background Component
description: Create a performant animated star field background using Canvas API or WebGL. Stars should twinkle at random intervals, slowly drift, and create depth through parallax layers. Must run at 60fps without impacting main thread. Include performance toggle in settings to disable on lower-end hardware.
acceptance_criteria: Canvas renders 200+ stars across three parallax depth layers
Stars twinkle with randomized timing and intensity
Animation runs at consistent 60fps (measured via Performance API)
requestAnimationFrame used with proper cleanup on unmount
Settings toggle disables animation and shows static gradient fallback
GPU acceleration via will-change and transform3d
agent_output: StarField component implemented with configurable star count, random positions, sizes, and twinkling animation delays.
